name: Can I beat bigger competitors in voice search without a huge SEO budget?
description: Yes, if your local details, reviews, and answers are clearer and more complete. Voice search often favors relevance and trust over brand size alone.

mainEntity.name: Can I beat bigger competitors in voice search without a huge SEO budget?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your competitors already have stronger reviews, better profiles, and more useful FAQ content, you can still compete by being more specific and more complete. Voice search often rewards the business that answers the question most clearly, not just the biggest brand.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if your local details, reviews, and answers are clearer and more complete. Voice search often favors relevance and trust over brand size alone.
